response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their background is primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, and their C++ experience is limited to academic or minor projects without scale or production impact.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling)
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership of cloud/DevOps teams
